nasb.text: And they were all amazed at the greatness of God. But while everyone was marveling at all that He was doing, He said to His disciples,

esv.text: And all were astonished at the majesty of God. But while they were all marveling at everything he was doing, Jesus said to his disciples,

cnv.text: 眾人都驚奇　神的大能。 眾人還在希奇耶穌所作的這一切時，他對門徒說：

ccb.text: 大家看见了上帝的大能，都很惊奇。 他们正为耶稣所做的一切惊讶不已时，耶稣对门徒说：

csbs.text: 大家都对神的威荣惊叹不已。 正当大家对耶稣所做的一切感到惊奇的时候，耶稣对他的门徒们说：
